uses: Claytonia rosulata, also known as winter purslane, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The plant is rich in health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and gastrointestinal issues.
